text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before the Japanese Derby, the participating
Umamusume gather for a press conference to talk
about their thoughts leading up to the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though the other participants are brimming with
excitement and nerves, Grass Wonder alone gives
calm, collected responses.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa sees through Grass Wonder's
polite facade, and comes by after the interviews
to challenge her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder's fighting spirit burns quietly as we
further prepare for the Japanese Derby.
